samples.gvd:
module signal_generator
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg [4:0] wave
);

    reg state;
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            state <= 1'b0;
            wave <= 5'd0;
        end
        else begin
            case (state)
                1'b0: begin
                    if (wave == 5'd31) begin
                        state <= 1'b1;
                    end
                    else begin
                        wave <= wave + 1;
                    end
                end
                1'b1: begin
                    if (wave == 5'd0) begin
                        state <= 1'b0;
                    end
                    else begin
                        wave <= wave - 1;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
    
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Implement a Triangle Wave signal generator module that generates a waveform by incrementing and decrementing a 5-bit signal named "wave". The waveform cycles between 0 and 31, which is incremented or decremented by 1.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal representing the generated waveform.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="state">State of the signal generator.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">State of the signal generator.</reg>
            <reg id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">5-bit output waveform signal representing the generated waveform.</reg>
            <always>
                <case>
                    <case_condition condition_id="state" condition_value="0">State 0</case_condition>
                    <case_action>
                        <statement>
                            <assign>
                                <assigne id="wave"/>
                                <assign_value>($signed(wave) + 1)</assign_value>
                            </assign>
                        </statement>
                    </case_action>
                    <case_condition condition_id="wave" condition_value="31">Wave 31</case_condition>
                    <case_action>
                        <statement>
                            <assign>
                                <assigne id="state"/>
                                <assign_value>(state + 1)</assign_value>
                            </assign>
                        </statement>
                    </case_action>
                    <case_condition condition_id="state" condition_value="1">State 1</case_condition>
                    <case_action>
                        <statement>
                            <assign>
                                <assigne id="wave"/>
                                <assign_value>($signed(wave) - 1)</assign_value>
                            </assign>
                        </statement>
                    </case_action>
                    <case_condition condition_id="wave" condition_value="0">Wave 0</case_condition>
                    <case_action>
                        <statement>
                            <assign>
                                <assigne id="state"/>
                                <assign_value>(state - 1)</assign_value>
                            </assign>
                        </statement>
                    </case_action>
                </case>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
